steps.title: Identify the key goal — what counts as 'specific historical context'
steps.content: The student wants to explain the sculpture's specific historical context. This means identifying the particular historical event the sculpture relates to and its connection in time — not providing the artist's biography, describing the sculpture's appearance, or listing details about an inscription in isolation.

steps.title: Match which choice accomplishes the goal
steps.content: Choice C directly states what the sculpture commemorates (the Emancipation Proclamation) and clarifies the temporal connection: the sculpture was completed in 1867, four years after the Proclamation was issued in 1863. This provides the specific historical event and its relation to the artwork. The others mention artist background, visual form, or inscription text without explaining the historical context. That matches choice C — C is correct.
